response.global_analysis: The video segment consists of a merchandise presentation by Kureiji Ollie followed by her performance of the song 'LoveIt?'. The spoken dialogue in the first half is a mix of English, Japanese, and Indonesian, which I have transcribed and translated accordingly. For the song performance, the audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON, although the video ends before the song concludes, so I have discarded the leftover lyrics. Timing is strictly tied to Ollie's vocalizations, ensuring no text appears during pauses or instrumental breaks.

subtitles.original: Always think of Ollie Wide Rubber Mat.
subtitles.english: Always think of Ollie Wide Rubber Mat.

subtitles.original: Wherever you're working, wherever you're gaming, you always remember me.
subtitles.english: Wherever you're working, wherever you're gaming, you always remember me.

subtitles.original: This... it kind of looks like a yandere, doesn't it?
subtitles.english: This... it kind of looks like a yandere, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: But I'm not a yandere, I'm just your girlfriend. Hehe.
subtitles.english: But I'm not a yandere, I'm just your girlfriend. Hehe.

subtitles.original: 「オリ一のこと、いつも考えて♡」ワイドラバ一マット
subtitles.english: Always think of Ollie Wide Rubber Mat.

subtitles.original: 普段使いにおすすめのちょっと大きめサイズです！
subtitles.english: It's a slightly large size, recommended for everyday use!

subtitles.original: そしてイラストは、花澤明先生です！
subtitles.english: And the illustration is by Hanasawa Akera-sensei!

subtitles.original: 花澤明先生！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Hanasawa Akera-sensei! Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: Okay, then the next item will be... こちら！
subtitles.english: Okay, then the next item will be... this one!

subtitles.original: Wow, it's a pillow! Isn't this so cute?
subtitles.english: Wow, it's a pillow! Isn't this so cute?

subtitles.original: クッションだよ！Banget!
subtitles.english: It's a cushion! So much!

subtitles.original: 「オリ一のこと、いつも夢に見て♡」
subtitles.english: Always dream of Ollie.

subtitles.original: 寝るときも私のことを思い出して、私の夢を見てね。
subtitles.english: When you sleep, remember me and dream of me.

subtitles.original: これ、すごくふわふわそうなので、安眠のためにぜひゲットしてください！
subtitles.english: This looks so fluffy, so please get it for a good night's sleep!

subtitles.original: Alright, and followed by... こちら！
subtitles.english: Alright, and followed by... this one!

subtitles.original: It's a ring necklace! Well, it's a ring,
subtitles.english: It's a ring necklace! Well, it's a ring,

subtitles.original: if it doesn't fit your size then you can just wear it as a necklace, isn't that really cool?
subtitles.english: if it doesn't fit your size then you can just wear it as a necklace, isn't that really cool?

subtitles.original: さて、これはね、指輪。
subtitles.english: So this is a ring.

subtitles.original: でも、もしサイズが合っていないなら、ネックレスとしても使うことができます！
subtitles.english: But if the size doesn't fit, you can also use it as a necklace!

subtitles.original: Ah! It's so cute! So make sure that when you go out, you wear this,
subtitles.english: Ah! It's so cute! So make sure that when you go out, you wear this,

subtitles.original: so that whenever you go grocery shopping,
subtitles.english: so that whenever you go grocery shopping,

subtitles.original: no other girls out there will be hitting on you.
subtitles.english: no other girls out there will be hitting on you.

subtitles.original: はい、そして次はこちら！
subtitles.english: Yes, and then we also have... this one!

subtitles.original: It's a mug! Isn't it so cute?
subtitles.english: It's a mug! Isn't it so cute?

subtitles.original: I really like the design!
subtitles.english: I really like the design!

subtitles.original: So not only when you're working, or gaming, or grocery shopping,
subtitles.english: So not only when you're working, or gaming, or grocery shopping,

subtitles.original: or... uh... sleeping,
subtitles.english: or... uh... sleeping,

subtitles.original: but even when you're drinking, you think of me!
subtitles.english: but even when you're drinking, you think of me!

subtitles.original: そしてもちろん、これも忘れないで... こちら！
subtitles.english: And of course, not forgetting... this one!

subtitles.original: 3ヶ国語のシチュエーションボイス！
subtitles.english: Situational voices in three languages!

subtitles.original: 日本語、インドネシア語、そして英語！
subtitles.english: In Japanese, Indonesian, and English!

subtitles.original: うわー、いつものように、さすが私！さすが私！
subtitles.english: Wow, as always, sasuga me! Sasuga me!

subtitles.original: はい、そして最後に、フルセットを購入いただいた方には、
subtitles.english: Yes, and finally, for those who purchased the full set,

subtitles.original: 数量限定で、直筆サイン入りチェキ風ブロマイドカードがついてきます。
subtitles.english: a limited quantity of handwritten signed instax-style bromide cards will be included.

subtitles.original: And for those of you guys who buy the full set, there will be a limited edition postcard
subtitles.english: And for those of you guys who buy the full set, there will be a limited edition postcard

subtitles.original: with my message and my sign! Yeah!
subtitles.english: with my message and my sign! Yeah!

subtitles.original: Jadi buat kalian yang beli full set-nya itu, bakal dapet postcard dari Ollie,
subtitles.english: So for those of you who buy the full set, you'll get a postcard from Ollie,

subtitles.original: ada message, ada tanda tangannya juga. です！
subtitles.english: with a message and a signature too. Desu!

subtitles.original: 次は、通常版は、箔押し複製サイン入り
subtitles.english: Next, the regular version comes with a foil-stamped replica signature

subtitles.original: チェキ風ブロマイドカードがついてきます。
subtitles.english: instax-style bromide card.

subtitles.original: And for those of you who buy like the normal version,
subtitles.english: And for those of you who buy like the normal version,

subtitles.original: you guys can also get the postcard with my sign and message!
subtitles.english: you guys can also get the postcard with my sign and message!

subtitles.original: Yang beli versi biasa juga akan dapat postcard yang ada message dan sign-nya.
subtitles.english: Those who buy the normal version will also get a postcard with a message and signature.

subtitles.original: Yap, itu aja... Jadinya panjang, ya? ちょっと長くなっちゃったかな？
subtitles.english: Yep, that's all... It got quite long, didn't it?

subtitles.original: でも私のグッズ、買ってくれるよね？
subtitles.english: But you'll buy my merch, won't you?

subtitles.original: TOPBGT!! やったー！
subtitles.english: TOPBGT!! Yay!

subtitles.original: Sebenarnya aku masih mau main sama kamu sih. もっと君と一緒に遊べたらいいんだけど、
subtitles.english: Actually, I still want to play with you. I wish I could spend more time with you,

subtitles.original: tapi udah waktunya kita berpisah... 残念ながら時間は限られているんだ... Damn!
subtitles.english: but it's already time for us to part... Unfortunately, our time is limited... Damn!

subtitles.original: Tapi sebelum itu, Ollie masih ada hadiah buat kamu! でもその前に一つだけ、あなたに贈りたいものがあるの！
subtitles.english: But before that, Ollie has one last gift for you! There's one thing I want to give to you!

subtitles.original: Jadi tolong dengarkan ya〜 だからちゃんと聞いてね〜 Don't go anywhere! Hehehehe.
subtitles.english: So please listen, okay? So listen closely, okay? Don't go anywhere! Hehehehe.

subtitles.original: こっちを向いて
subtitles.english: Look this way

subtitles.original: 声を聞かせて
subtitles.english: Let me hear your voice

subtitles.original: 私を見て
subtitles.english: Look at me

subtitles.original: 私一番ね
subtitles.english: I'm number one, right?

subtitles.original: ゾッとした顔が可愛いね
subtitles.english: I love that face you make when terrified

subtitles.original: 君のその身体が欲しいの
subtitles.english: That body of yours, want it so badly to be mine, oh

subtitles.original: Loveit? Loveit?
subtitles.english: Love it? Love it?

subtitles.original: Lali. Loveit. High.
subtitles.english: Lali. I love it. High.

subtitles.original: 可哀想ね君は悪い子なのね
subtitles.english: Poor thing, you're such a bad boy.

subtitles.original: どの顔がお好きで 散々
subtitles.english: Which face do you like? Scattered.

subtitles.original: 色目が お上手で 頭沸き
subtitles.english: You are still very good at using colorful eyes. My head hurts.

subtitles.original: 君に踊らされちゃって アタシは狂う
subtitles.english: You make me dance. I'm going crazy.

subtitles.original: What is Loveit?
subtitles.english: What is Loveit?

subtitles.original: 君の血肉まで
subtitles.english: Down to your flesh and blood

subtitles.original: 骨の髄まで
subtitles.english: Even to the marrow of your bones

subtitles.original: 入れてから空っぽになる 愛のパペット
subtitles.english: Filling me up until I'm empty, a puppet of love

subtitles.original: 胸が苦しいね
subtitles.english: My chest hurts, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: 息が詰まるのね
subtitles.english: My breath catches, doesn't it?

subtitles.original: それが恋と教えてあげる あはは
subtitles.english: That's what love is, I'll teach you. Ahaha.

subtitles.original: 虚ろな声で ほら囁いて
subtitles.english: With a vacant voice, look, whisper

subtitles.original: いい子ね 首輪付けた君は Loveit
subtitles.english: Good boy, you with the collar on, Loveit

subtitles.original: イカれちゃった？
subtitles.english: Have you gone crazy?

subtitles.original: Noね 恋は盲目ね
subtitles.english: No, love is blind, isn't it?

subtitles.original: したいよね してあげるわ
subtitles.english: You want to, don't you? I'll do it for you.

subtitles.original: 逝って？ あはは
subtitles.english: Go? Ahaha.

subtitles.original: 濡れて君の紅い跡 溺れるまで
subtitles.english: Drenched in your red marks until I drown

subtitles.original: 痛い痛いの飛んで行け 痺れるまで
subtitles.english: Pain, pain, go away, until I'm numb
